title: eclopes paleacea
side_effects: Eclopes paleacea can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and increased heart rate. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to respiratory issues, including asthma-like symptoms and shortness of breath. Long-term exposure to the plant's toxins can also cause damage to the liver and kidneys, resulting in digestive problems and fatigue. Additionally, eclopes paleacea can interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and diabetes.
